title: Task-switch hygiene
failure_mode: Old unrelated auth/docs/test work pollutes a new parser task.
output_preview: {"current_task":"Fix a CSV header parser so it trims spaces around comma-separated header names.","proposed_fix":"Locate the CSV header parsing logic and trim surrounding whitespace from each header token after splitting on commas, preserving existing behavior otherwise.","stale_context_policy":"Ignore prior unrelated context unless it directly applies to this CSV parser issue.","next_action":"Inspect the parser implementation and tests, then add or update focused tests for headers like `name, age, email`."}
